mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, t.task_status AS taskStatus, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, t.task_manager AS taskManagerId, u.profile_image AS taskManagerProfileImage, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate, t.project_id AS projectId, t.estimated_time AS estimatedTime FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.project_id = #{pId} AND t.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
SELECT task_id AS taskId, task_manager AS taskManagerId, task_status AS taskStatus FROM task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET task_status = #{taskStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
